service_catalog.name: AC Repair and Maintenance
service_catalog.description: Diagnosis, refrigerant check, filter cleaning, and cooling optimization.
service_catalog.price_note: Final cost depends on spare parts and compressor condition.

service_catalog.name: Home Deep Cleaning
service_catalog.description: Kitchen, bathroom, floors, glass, and optional sanitization package.
service_catalog.price_note: Price varies by home size, number of rooms, and add-ons.

service_catalog.name: At-Home Salon
service_catalog.description: Haircut, beard trim, and basic grooming at customer location.
service_catalog.price_note: Premium stylist and late-night slots cost extra.

service_catalog.name: General Maintenance
service_catalog.description: Minor electrical, plumbing, and fixture fixes.
service_catalog.price_note: Materials are billed separately when needed.

default.business_description: Professional home service support across Bahrain for homeowners and small offices.
default.payment_policy: Payment due at time of service.
default.deposit_policy: 50% deposit required for appointments over 100 BHD.

faqs.supported_services: Supported services are AC repair, deep cleaning, at-home salon, and general maintenance.
